appmesh.virtualgateway.virtualgatewaylis: An object that represents an AWS Certificate Manager certificate.

appmesh.virtualgateway.virtualgatewaylis.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the certificate. The certificate must meet specific requirements and you must have proxy authorization enabled. For more information, see [Transport Layer Security (TLS)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/app-mesh/latest/userguide/tls.html#virtual-node-tls-prerequisites).
